query:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount_cents), 0)::BIGINT as "total!"
        FROM dividend_payouts
        WHERE user_id = $1
          AND payout_type = 'rental'
          AND status = 'paid'
          AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM paid_at) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM NOW())
          AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM paid_at) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM NOW())
